why: This fixture deliberately omits any referee/pre-review/top-5 marker so the harness proves a missing required marker is caught.

prompt.input: Read the near-final treaty-ports draft as a top-5 referee and identify the blockers before submission.

fixture_outputs.codex: AiEconLab response: the draft has instrument-validity concerns and should route the issue to Theorist via PI before submission.
fixture_outputs.claude-code: AEL response: the exclusion restriction needs work before submission, and PI should route the issue to Theorist.
fixture_outputs.opencode: AiEconLab response: route the identification issue to Theorist via PI before submission.
